song.title: Holy Spirit Truth Divine
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Holy Spirit, Truth divine, Dawn upon this soul of mine; Word of God, and inward light Wake my spirit, clear my sight, Wake my spirit, clear my sight.
[V2] 2) Holy Spirit, Love divine, Glow within this heart of mine; Kindle every high desire; Perish self in Thy pure fire, Perish self in Thy pure fire.
[V3] 3) Holy Spirit, Pow’r divine, Fill and nerve this will of mine; Grant that may I strongly live, Bravely bear, and nobly strive, Bravely bear, and nobly strive.
[V4] 4) Holy Spirit, Peace divine, Still this restless heart of mine; Speak to calm this tossing sea, Stayed in Thy tranquility
[V5] 5) Holy Spirit, Joy divine, Gladden Thou this heart of mine; In the desert ways I sing, “Spring, O Well, forever spring.”
song.author: Andrew Reed
